texto: Ever since about 3.8 billion years ago, when the first cells began quivering in the primordial ooze, Evolution has produced a nonstop parade of inflatable noses, bizarre genitalia, awkward feeding habits, aggressively antisocial tendencies, and mucus. So much mucus.
explicacao: Citação de Mara Grunbaum sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Ever since about 3.8 billion years ago, when the first cells began quivering in the primordial oo…” articula reflexao, evolution, mucus em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
